zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruy González de Ceballos於1254年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza30歲，母親Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez25歲。他於1275年與Maria Fernández de Caviedes在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1355年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞享年101歲，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruy González de Ceballos于1254年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza30岁，母亲Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez25岁。他于1275年与Maria Fernández de Caviedes在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1355年在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞享年101岁，埋葬在西班牙安達盧希亞澤維利亞澤維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceballos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

variants.name: Ceballo
meanings: Spanish (mainly southern): probably an altered form (singular) of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Cevallos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

nameMeanings.name: Ruy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Rodrigo .  This form was common in the Middle Ages, being borne, for example, by  El Cid ,  Ruy Diaz de Vivar  (  ?1043–99 ).

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Visigothic: from a personal name formed with gund ‘battle, strife’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

en.lifeSummary: When Ruy González de Ceballos was born in 1254, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza, was 30 and his mother, Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, was 25. He married Maria Fernández de Caviedes in 1275, in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1355, in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain, at the age of 101, and was buried in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalusia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruy González de Ceballos est né en 1254, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Maria Fernández de Caviedes en 1275, à Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1355, à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne, à l’âge de 101 ans, et a été enterré à Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ruy González de Ceballos 1254 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza 30 und seine Mutter Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez 25. Er hat 1275 in Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Maria Fernández de Caviedes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien und wurde in Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy González de Ceballos è nato il nel 1254 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Maria Fernández de Caviedes nel 1275, nel Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1355, nel Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna, all'età di 101 anni, e fu sepolto a Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruy González de Ceballosが1254年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Azaは30歳，母Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindezは25歳であった。1275年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドトーレドでMaria Fernández de Caviedesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1355年にスペインアンダルクiアセヴィラセヴィラで101歳で死去し，スペインアンダルクiアセヴィラセヴィラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruy González de Ceballos(이)가 1254년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1275년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도 톨도에서 Maria Fernández de Caviedes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1355년 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에서 101세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 앤다루ci아 세비라 세비라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruy González de Ceballos nasceu em 1254, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Fernández de Caviedes em 1275, em Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha, com 101 anos, e foi sepultado em Sevilla, Sevilla, Andaluzia, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruy González de Ceballos родился в 1254 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Fernández de Caviedes в 1275 г. в местности толедо, толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания в возрасте 101 год и был похоронен в местности севилла, севилла, андалукiа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruy González de Ceballos nació en 1254, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Gonzalo Diaz de Cevallos y Ordonez de Aza, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Antolina De La Hoz Y Galindez, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Maria Fernández de Caviedes en 1275, en Toledo, Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1355, en Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, España, a la edad de 101 años, y fue sepultado en Sevilla, Sevilla, Andalucía, España.
